title: Efficient Room Service Delivery in Egyptian Hotels
trigger: Guest places a room service order via in-room phone or hotel app.

steps.title: Order Reception
steps.action: Receive the room service order through the PMS or directly via the in-room phone. Confirm the order details with the guest, including any special requests or dietary restrictions.

steps.title: Order Preparation
steps.action: Transmit the order to the kitchen staff. Ensure that the kitchen is aware of any special requests or dietary restrictions. Monitor the preparation process to ensure timely completion.

steps.title: Quality Check
steps.action: Conduct a quality check of the prepared items to ensure they meet hotel standards. Verify the order against the guest's request.

next_steps.condition: Order does not meet quality standards

steps.title: Order Delivery
steps.action: Deliver the order to the guest's room. Ensure courteous interaction and confirm the guest's satisfaction upon delivery.

steps.title: Post-Delivery Follow-Up
steps.action: Follow up with the guest after 30 minutes to ensure satisfaction with the service and address any further needs.

description: This playbook outlines the steps for efficient room service delivery in hotels, ensuring high guest satisfaction and operational excellence.
escalation_path: If issues arise during any step, escalate to the Room Service Manager.
